'''Parnath''' was a [[Carosite]] cyberneticist who trained on [[Carosi XII]]; however, he was exiled from the planet for his unethical practices. Most repulsive to the Carosites was his wholesale pursuit of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Parnath then moved to the [[Vergesso Base]] and set a business in [[The Life]] section, where he would perform any cybernetic enhancements requested of him, provided the payment was good.

==Sources==
